title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
